CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-24-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-09-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Feb-10-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

9:14am There were no appearances at the first calling of the case. The court passes the matter.
9:40am The court recalls the case.

No Apperarances in open court. The court states it received a late contest email last Friday. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

Plaintiff JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s unopposed Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is DENIED. Plaintiff failed to demonstrate a right to judgment in its favor. Plaintiff's motion turns on requests for admission to Defendant that have been deemed admitted. Plaintiff sought judicial notice of the order deeming the requests admitted, but did not seek notice (or even submit) of the requests, themselves. The court is left without sufficient information on this motion to find Defendant admitted all facts material to the specific judgment sought.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted; Memorandum In Support Of Motion; Declaration In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Dec-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing re:PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted.

No appearances made. The court adopts the tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion for order that matters in request for admission of truth of facts be deemed admitted is granted; no timely opposition filed. Proposed order signed and filed.

Judge: Richard B Ulmer Jr; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported.(302/RBU)
